steps.title: Substitute t=5
steps.content: The equation $s=45+3t$ gives speed at time $t$. Substitute $t=5$: $$s=45+3(5).$$

steps.title: Compute the result
steps.content: So $s=60$ mph. That confirms D is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches the correct answer, $60$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so D is correct.
